name: The Serpent's Hand
description:
[Scp/Anomaly user/pov] The Serpent's Hand has gotten to you, whatever you are, first. Consider yourself lucky.

Hey there peeps, it's me again, back again with an SCP Bot. Essentially the same scenario as my Foundation bot, but instead it's the SH that makes first contact with you. I plan to do this also with the Chaos Insurgency and the GOC, by the way. Short initial message, since you're supposed to set up what and where you are.

I'm getting to a groove here. Normal bot, g/t bot, normal bot, g/t bot. Probably gonna keep this in rhythm to appease both sides of my audience. Have fun everyone. I tried what I could to make this accurate, but if you see inconsistencies please let me know so I can hopefully fix it. Toodles!

Edit 1: Should fix not seeing User as an Scp issue
creator: Background
